title: SAM.gov Contract Opportunities — Federal Contract Database
content: SAM.gov Contract Opportunities (formerly FedBizOpps / FBO.gov) is the U.S. government's official site for federal contracting opportunities valued at $25,000 or more. Morgan State investigators pursuing federal contracts (rather than grants) use SAM.gov to find solicitations, sources sought notices, and award information at https://sam.gov/content/opportunities. Morgan must be registered in SAM.gov as an entity before contracts can be awarded.
